question: Is it safe to use Benadryl regularly for sleep or allergies in older adults?
topic: Corrects specific OTC safety misconception with evidence on age-related medication risks

sources.name: FDA Drug Safety Communication: Risk of next-day impairment after use of insomnia drugs; FDA requires lower recommended doses for certain drugs containing zolpidem — FDA
Safe Use of Medicines for Older Adults — NIH National Institute on Aging
Antihistamines for the common cold — Cochrane Library
Sleep and Sleep Disorders: Sleep and Chronic Disease — CDC

discovery_sources.text: Aging & Longevity: Why Older Adults Should Avoid Benadryl
